message:
feat(core): add fleet_pressure_tier to HealthSnapshot schema (ft-dwjtm)

Extend HealthSnapshot with an optional fleet_pressure_tier field that
surfaces the FleetScrollbackCoordinator's compound pressure tier
(Normal/Elevated/Critical/Emergency) through the health API.

Update all existing HealthSnapshot constructors across tests in crash,
renderers, storage, incident_bundle_tests, proptest_crash, and
storage_labruntime to include the new field (None for most tests,
Some("Normal") for serialization round-trip).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
